info.title: Synapse Admin API
info.description: Synapse is the reference Matrix homeserver implementation by Element. The Admin API provides server administration endpoints for managing users, rooms, media, server configuration, registration tokens, and more. All endpoints require server admin privileges.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by user ID or display name

get.summary: List rooms a user is in
get.description: List rooms a user is in

post.summary: Get access token for a user
post.description: Get access token for a user

accessToken.description: Access token for a server admin user.
